primary.name: Bright Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, main brand highlights

secondary.name: Cyan
secondary.usage: Glow effects, secondary accents, tech-lines, hover states

accent.name: Orange
accent.usage: Warnings, selective high-contrast CTA, data chart highlights

neutral.name: Steel Gray
neutral.usage: Subtitles, borders, inactive states, secondary text

text_main.name: Black
text_main.usage: Main headings, body text for maximum contrast

typography.font_setup_instructions: Import 'Outfit' (weights 300, 400, 500, 700) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (weights 300, 400, 500, 600) from Google Fonts in index.css or via your framework font loader.

visual_effects.cursor_spotlight: Implement a subtle spotlight effect following the cursor using a radial gradient (e.g., radial-gradient(600px at x y, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.05), transparent 80%)).
visual_effects.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with border border-slate-200/50 for sticky headers and floating panels.
visual_effects.hover_tilt: Use framer-motion or vanilla tilt effect for subtle 3D hover effects on portfolio cards.
visual_effects.shadows: Use soft ambient shadows (e.g., shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]) instead of harsh drop shadows.
visual_effects.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0 (slate-200) for clean structural grids, occasionally enhanced with cyan hover states.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use py-24 for main sections, gap-8 to gap-12 for bento grids.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For Programs and Portfolio sections, utilize asymmetrical bento box layouts (e.g., mixing col-span-2 and col-span-1 elements).
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: For the Finance Dashboard, use a dense grid (gap-6) with crisp edges and minimal padding (p-6) inside cards to maximize data density.

component_rules.buttons: Rounded edges (rounded-full or rounded-md depending on context), hover state must translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow. Primary CTA uses bright blue (#0EA5E9) with cyan (#06B6D4) hover.
component_rules.cards: White background, 1px slate-200 border, soft shadow, rounded-2xl for marketing, rounded-lg for dashboard.
component_rules.inputs: Use Shadcn UI inputs with white background, focus ring in bright blue.
component_rules.charts: Use Recharts with custom tooltips. Chart colors: Blue, Cyan, Orange, Slate.
component_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a clean, technical look.

hero_background.description: Abstract light cyan geometry for hero background with subtle overlay

robotics_lab_hero.description: Modern white robotics lab with robotic arm and technicians

quadruped_robot.description: High-tech robotic dog on a tiled surface

robotic_arm_tech.description: Sleek industrial robot arm in a laboratory setting

university_campus.description: Modern university campus building for partnerships section

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on light backgrounds maintains a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Use black or slate-800 for body text.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus states (ring-2 ring-cyan-500).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for parallax and floating animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the hero section with a cursor spotlight effect using a radial gradient that tracks the mouse pointer.
Implement the strategic finance dashboard using Recharts for data visualization, ensuring Indian number formatting (lakhs/crores) is applied to financial data.
Design the portfolio section with pseudo-3D tilt cards (e.g., using framer-motion) that react to hover.
The admin edit mode should wrap editable sections with a subtle dashed border and 'Edit' button overlay when authenticated as Team Robokoshal.
Apply a light-futuristic aesthetic. Avoid heavy use of dark mode; rely on white space, steel gray borders, and vibrant cyan/blue accents to create a premium tech feel.
For the robotics lab setup planner, build an interactive calculator with category-based item selection.
